class.name: RectangleWire
class.description: [RectangleWire] builds a rectangular closed wire on an optional [CadPlane]. It is the first profile primitive on top of the placement-helper layer.

method.name: build_rectangle
method.description: Builds a rectangular wire of [param size] on [param plane]. If [param plane] is omitted, the global XY plane is used. When [param centered] is [code]true[/code], the rectangle is centered on the plane origin.
